caveat.zh: 球探报告只作为技术画像和候选观察线索；报告中的俱乐部、年龄、身价与国家队均为发布时快照，不得单独覆盖官方注册事实。客座文章不等同于 Jacek Kulig 的独立结论。
caveat.en: Scouting reports are discovery and technical-profile leads only. Clubs, ages, values, and national teams are publication-time snapshots and must not override official registration facts. Guest articles are not independent conclusions by Jacek Kulig.

scope.inclusion_rule: Publicly accessible individual profiles, Talent of the Day posts, image reports, or named entries in a Football Talent Scout country index.

summary.zh: 194cm 左脚支点中锋；报告强调终结、串联、背身、头球、身体条件与双足能力，改进项为短距离爆发、反击适配、协调性和狭小空间处理。
summary.en: A 194cm left-footed target forward. The report highlights finishing, link-up and hold-up play, heading, physicality, and two-footedness, with explosiveness, transition fit, coordination, and tight-space play to improve.

summary.zh: 边锋/前锋观察样本；FTS 将其描述为爆发型边锋或内切攻击手，模板为 Gabriel Martinelli。
summary.en: A winger/forward watch sample described by FTS as an explosive winger or inside forward, with Gabriel Martinelli as the comparison.

summary.zh: 前腰/边锋观察样本；报告角色为进攻组织者，强调速度、技术、控球、创造力和灵活性。
summary.en: An attacking-midfield/wing watch sample profiled as an advanced playmaker, with pace, technique, ball control, creativity, and agility highlighted.

summary.zh: 后腰/中前卫/前腰观察样本；报告角色为游弋组织者，强调传球、视野、技术、移动、勇气、跑动和多面性。
summary.en: A defensive/central/attacking midfield watch sample profiled as a roaming playmaker, highlighting passing, vision, technique, mobility, bravery, work rate, and versatility.

summary.zh: 中场/前腰/边锋观察样本；FTS 评价为游弋或前腰型组织者，模板为 Luka Modrić/Gavi。
summary.en: A midfield/attacking-midfield/wing watch sample profiled as a roaming or advanced playmaker, compared with Luka Modrić/Gavi.

summary.zh: 后腰/中前卫/前腰观察样本；报告强调传球、视野、技术、球商、站位、抢断、跑动和多面性，模板为 Youri Tielemans。
summary.en: A defensive/central/attacking midfield watch sample highlighting passing, vision, technique, football IQ, positioning, tackling, work rate, and versatility, compared with Youri Tielemans.

summary.zh: 左中卫/左后卫观察样本；报告强调速度、抢断、勇气、韧性、跑动、预判、传球和传中。
summary.en: A left-sided centre-back/full-back watch sample highlighting pace, tackling, bravery, tenacity, work rate, anticipation, passing, and crossing.

summary.zh: 前腰/边锋观察样本；报告强调传球、视野、创造力、技术、速度、第一脚触球和盘带，模板为 James Rodríguez。
summary.en: An attacking-midfield/wing watch sample highlighting passing, vision, creativity, technique, pace, first touch, and dribbling, compared with James Rodríguez.

summary.zh: 中场/前腰/边锋观察样本；FTS 韩国索引记录其来自全北现代青训并进入韩国 U17 观察范围。
summary.en: A midfield/attacking-midfield/wing watch sample listed by FTS with Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors' academy and South Korea U17.

summary.zh: 边锋/影锋观察样本；FTS 韩国索引记录其大田韩亚市民青训与韩国 U17 背景。
summary.en: A winger/second-forward watch sample listed by FTS with Daejeon Hana Citizen's academy and South Korea U17.

summary.zh: 边锋/影锋观察样本；报告角色为内切攻击手，强调速度、爆发、盘带、技术、控球、勇气和灵活性。
summary.en: A winger/second-forward watch sample profiled as an inside forward, highlighting pace, acceleration, dribbling, technique, ball control, bravery, and agility.

summary.zh: 左后卫/翼卫/边锋观察样本；报告角色为翼卫，强调速度、爆发、盘带、控球、传中、勇气与灵活性。
summary.en: A left-back/wing-back/wing watch sample profiled as a wing-back, highlighting pace, acceleration, dribbling, ball control, crossing, bravery, and agility.

summary.zh: 客座中场报告，强调控球、第一脚触球、推进、视野、传球和定位球能力；其结论不视为 Jacek Kulig 的独立评分。
summary.en: A guest midfield report highlighting ball control, first touch, carrying, vision, passing, and set pieces; its conclusions are not treated as an independent Jacek Kulig rating.

summary.zh: 中前卫/前腰/边锋观察样本；报告评价为前腰型组织者，强调速度、技术、创造力、传球、视野、跑动和定位球。
summary.en: A central/attacking midfield and wing watch sample profiled as an advanced playmaker, highlighting pace, technique, creativity, passing, vision, work rate, and set pieces.

summary.zh: 多位置组织型中场观察样本；报告强调传球、视野、技术、球商、创造力、控球、第一脚触球与定位球。
summary.en: A versatile playmaking-midfielder watch sample highlighting passing, vision, technique, football IQ, creativity, ball control, first touch, and set pieces.

summary.zh: 前腰/边锋观察样本；报告强调传球、视野、创造力、技术、盘带、远射与定位球，模板为 David Silva。
summary.en: An attacking-midfield/wing watch sample highlighting passing, vision, creativity, technique, dribbling, long shots, and set pieces, compared with David Silva.

summary.zh: 中卫/右后卫/后腰观察样本；FTS 索引记录其布尼奥德科青训与乌兹别克斯坦 U20 背景。
summary.en: A centre-back/right-back/defensive-midfield watch sample listed by FTS with Bunyodkor's academy and Uzbekistan U20.

summary.zh: FTS 乌兹别克斯坦 Talent of the Day 观察样本；当前仅保留可复核的索引关联，不补猜测评分。
summary.en: An Uzbekistan Talent of the Day watch sample; only the verifiable index association is retained and no rating is inferred.

summary.zh: FTS 乌兹别克斯坦 Talent of the Day 观察样本；当前仅保留可复核的索引关联，不补猜测评分。
summary.en: An Uzbekistan Talent of the Day watch sample; only the verifiable index association is retained and no rating is inferred.

summary.zh: 前锋/边锋/前腰客座报告；强调终结、跑位、技术、控球、盘带、创造力和灵活性，并指出需要增强身体对抗。
summary.en: A guest forward/wing/attacking-midfield report highlighting finishing, movement, technique, ball control, dribbling, creativity, and agility, with physical development to improve.

summary.zh: 左脚中锋观察样本；FTS 沙特索引记录其吉达联合青训与沙特 U17 背景。
summary.en: A left-footed centre-forward watch sample listed by FTS with Al-Ittihad's academy and Saudi Arabia U17.

summary.zh: 边锋/前锋观察样本；报告角色为内切攻击手，强调速度、爆发、盘带、控球、跑位、勇气和运动能力。
summary.en: A wing/forward watch sample profiled as an inside forward, highlighting pace, acceleration, dribbling, ball control, movement, bravery, and athleticism.

summary.zh: 边锋/影锋观察样本；报告角色为内切攻击手，强调速度、盘带、技术、控球、跑位和多面性。
summary.en: A wing/second-forward watch sample profiled as an inside forward, highlighting pace, dribbling, technique, ball control, movement, and versatility.

summary.zh: 客座中场报告，记录其塞帕罕青训和伊朗青年国家队阶段的组织、推进与比赛影响力；不视为 Jacek Kulig 的独立评分。
summary.en: A guest midfield report covering his Sepahan academy and Iran youth-national-team development, organisation, progression, and match influence; it is not treated as an independent Jacek Kulig rating.

summary.zh: 影锋/中锋观察样本；FTS 球员索引记录其 PERSIS Solo 与印度尼西亚 U20 背景。
summary.en: A second-forward/centre-forward watch sample listed by FTS with PERSIS Solo and Indonesia U20.

summary.zh: 边锋观察样本；报告强调速度、爆发、盘带、控球、射门力量、灵活性、勇气、跑位、双足与运动能力。
summary.en: A winger watch sample highlighting pace, acceleration, dribbling, ball control, shot power, agility, bravery, movement, two-footedness, and athleticism.

summary.zh: 边锋/影锋/中锋观察样本；报告强调速度、爆发、动态能力、终结、跑位、运动能力、灵活性、技术与盘带。
summary.en: A wing/second-forward/centre-forward watch sample highlighting pace, acceleration, dynamism, finishing, movement, athleticism, agility, technique, and dribbling.

summary.zh: 澳大利亚青年攻击手客座专题，重点讨论其速度、力量、盘带和早期成年队突破；不视为统一 10 分制个人报告。
summary.en: A guest feature on an Australian youth attacker, focusing on pace, power, dribbling, and an early senior breakthrough; it is not treated as a standardised 10-point profile.

summary.zh: 澳大利亚边锋客座专题，强调一对一、技巧、爆发、创造力和防守投入；不视为统一 10 分制个人报告。
summary.en: A guest feature on an Australian winger, highlighting one-on-one play, skill, acceleration, creativity, and defensive effort; it is not treated as a standardised 10-point profile.

summary.zh: 中前卫/前腰/边锋观察样本；报告角色为进攻组织者，强调爆发、技术、控球、传球、视野、创造力、球商和灵活性。
summary.en: A central/attacking midfield and wing watch sample profiled as an advanced playmaker, highlighting acceleration, technique, ball control, passing, vision, creativity, football IQ, and agility.

name.zh: 沙特青年联赛 U18 前 20 人
name.en: Top 20 U18 Talents in the Saudi Youth Premier League
An Iraqi generation looking for glory
